@LagoonTrading That is not my personal form of activism, no, but I have seen first-hand arguments about tactics used to wedge movements; policing other people’s activism is a red flag to me, in either direction, peace police ARE dangerous agreed. The pacifists tho? My allies in objective.

@LagoonTrading “Our people have made the mistake of confusing the methods with the objectives. As long as we agree on objectives, we should never fall out with each other just because we believe in different methods or tactics or strategy to reach a common goal”
@LagoonTrading Diversity of tactics goes both ways tho

@BrandyZadrozny I spent all winter going to a pottery studio filled with incredibly skilled ceramicists working- and then me, a caveman, in a corner making a mess. The only way to keep going was to define success as going to the studio. Anything else; heartbreaking. https://t.co/r6EAx879OL
@BrandyZadrozny define success as doing the thing, and only that- "sitting down" is doing the work, even if I'm not proud of the work that comes - that's the only thing that works for me
